privileged_info_summary: The flood_fill task is a GIMP Bucket Fill tool interaction task using a synthetic 800x600 pixel image with geometric shapes including a white circle target. Verification uses four evaluation criteria: (1) significant color change (≥2% of pixels), (2) substantial fill area (≥500 pixels), (3) good boundary respect (compactness ≥0.3, aspect ratio ≤3:1, dimensions >20px), (4) localized fill (≤3 separate regions). Pass threshold is 75% score (≥3/4 criteria met). Pixel difference threshold for change detection is 30 intensity units. Image has timeout of 1200 seconds (20 minutes) and maximum 10 steps. NOTE: README documentation contains two contradicted claims: it states '>85% coverage' requirement but verifier only checks compactness; it states '>5% pixel change' requirement but verifier uses ≥2%.
